--- gunicorn.conf.py (top 12 lines) ---
import threading

# Make psycopg2 cooperative with gevent — eliminates worker timeouts.
try:
    from psycogreen.gevent import patch_psycopg
    patch_psycopg()
except ImportError:
    pass
workers             = 1      # single worker so SSE subscribers share memory with cart updates
worker_class        = "gevent"
worker_connections  = 500   # gevent handles hundreds of concurrent SSE + API connections
